zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Clarell於1390年出生在英國越可爾阿爾德瓦可時，她的父親Thomas Clarell Sr.26歲，母親Matilda Montgomery11歲。她於1409年與John Gresley在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1448年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德拉可洛福享年58歲，埋葬在英國越可爾沃茲沃思 白 賀布登 布里奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Clarell于1390年出生在英国越可爾阿爾德瓦可时，她的父亲Thomas Clarell Sr.26岁，母亲Matilda Montgomery11岁。她于1409年与John Gresley在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1448年在英国英格兰德比夏爾德拉可洛福享年58岁，埋葬在英国越可爾沃茲沃思 白 賀布登 布里奇。

nameMeanings.name: Clarell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: from clavell ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.

variants.name: Clavel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alfredo, Angel, Bernardina, Carlos, Consuelo, Fernando, Gustavo, Jeronimo, Jorge, Luis, Margarita.  French Andre, Eugenie, Fernande, Jean-Claude, Pierre.
Spanish: from clavel ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.
French: from Old French clavel ‘bolt (of a door or gate)’ or ‘nail, link, ring (of chain mail)’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller. Compare Clewell .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Clarell was born in 1390, in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England, her father, Thomas Clarell Sr., was 26 and her mother, Matilda Montgomery, was 11. She married John Gresley in 1409, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1448, in Drakelow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Wadsworth by Hebden Bridge, Yorkshire, England.

Elle a épousé John Gresley en 1409, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1448, à Drakelow, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Wadsworth by Hebden Bridge, Everwyck, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1409 in Yorkshire, England John Gresley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Clarellが1390年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルドワークで生まれた時，父Thomas Clarell Sr.は26歳，母Matilda Montgomeryは11歳であった。1409年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでJohn Gresleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1448年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウで58歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアワドスウオルス ビー ヘブデン ブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.Wadsworth, Yorkshire, England: 영국 요르크실르 와드스워스 비 브든 브리지
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Clarell(이)가 1390년 영국 요르크실르 알드워크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Clarell Sr.(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Montgomery(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1409년 영국 요르크실르에서 John Gresley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 드라켈로에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 와드스워스 비 브든 브리지에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Gresley em 1409, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. ru.Wadsworth, Yorkshire, England: вадсворт би хебден бридж, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Clarell родилась в 1390 г. в местности алдварк, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Clarell Sr. было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Montgomery, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Gresley в 1409 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1448 г. в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности вадсворт би хебден бридж, еркшир, Англия.
